title: calophyllum rigidulum
intro: Calophyllum rigidulum, also known as the "Rigid Calophyllum," is a species of tree native to the tropical regions of Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its oil, which has anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Calophyllum rigidulum include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and protecting against infections, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. Calophyllum rigidulum oil can be prepared through cold-pressing, and is often used in herbal remedies, including topical creams and ointments for skin conditions and wounds.
